title: Automated Student Permissions System
context: University admin workflow handling 1,200+ permission requests/month.
problem: Manual approvals caused 3–5 day delays and frequent errors.
constraints: Legacy Java stack, no new paid tools, SMS required.
solution: Built a Spring Boot service with rules engine + SMS gateway integration.
architecture: Client -> API Gateway -> Permission Service -> Legacy DB
impact: 80% faster processing, 60% fewer errors, 10 hrs/week admin time saved.
role: Owned backend architecture and automation logic.

title: Structural Code Quality Analyzer
context: Tool to detect fragile modules in large codebases.
problem: Developers lacked insight into change-impact risk.
constraints: No runtime profiling, static analysis only.
solution: Built dependency graph + fragility scoring engine.
architecture: Source Code -> AST Parser -> Graph Builder -> Scorer -> Report
impact: Identified 30% of high-risk modules in test repo.
role: Designed scoring model and dependency analyzer.
